title: From Privacy to Trust: Challenges Taxonomy and Blueprint for Trustworthy Federated Learning
description_es: Este artículo presenta una taxonomía de desafíos y un plan de acción para desarrollar sistemas de aprendizaje federado que sean no solo privados sino también confiables en un sentido más amplio.
abstract: Federated learning promises privacy-preserving distributed training, but trustworthiness extends beyond privacy alone. This paper presents a comprehensive taxonomy of challenges in building trustworthy federated learning systems and provides a blueprint for addressing them. We examine privacy, security, fairness, and governance dimensions, offering practical guidance for deploying FL in sensitive domains.

citations.apa: Rodríguez-Barroso, N., García-Márquez, M., Luzón, M. V., & Herrera, F. (2026). From Privacy to Trust: Challenges Taxonomy and Blueprint for Trustworthy Federated Learning. Information Fusion.
citations.mla: Rodríguez-Barroso, Nuria, Mario García-Márquez, María Victoria Luzón, and Francisco Herrera. "From Privacy to Trust: Challenges Taxonomy and Blueprint for Trustworthy Federated Learning." Information Fusion, 2026.
